commands.name: call
commands.description: Call a read-only method on a contract.

options.name: --params
options.description: See the documentation for more info: https://docs.aelf.io

commands.name: config
commands.description: Get, set, delete or list aelf cli config.

options.name: --key
options.description: The key of config item. (Supported keys: endpoint, account and password.)

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy or update a smart contract

commands.name: faucet
commands.description: Take test token from AElf Test Net.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generates a new contract development solution based on the AElf Boilerplate templates.

commands.name: send
commands.description: Execute a method on a contract.

options.name: --params
options.description: See the documentation for more info: https://docs.aelf.io

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start an AElf blockchain node on local machine.

commands.name: token
commands.description: Create a new token in AElf MultiToken Contract.

options.name: --path
options.description: The path of the contract's DLL.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Overwrite contract's DLL instead of saving with .patched extension.

options.name: --skipaudit
options.description: Skip performing code check on contract code.

options.name: --treatsystem
options.description: Treat as system contract when patching.
